{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":3014},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7262777736878654244","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第二百二十七章，一口气看到这里，怎么说了，除了有很多错漏字以外，总体上算的上尚佳，故事还是挺吸引人的，趣味性很足，是不是能将我逗乐！给个好评，作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690997495,"group_id":"7241145924909534248","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"首先，我不主动骂人的，但要是有人上前找骂，我也不会吝啬的。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9exdeWSjbgWKGXI3seuOLdiBpb7KLKnnYF8Y8mnZu4Y","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/29e3be43f86d48a4b72ccf7d46895e9e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788020&x-signature=Zvowdmvh5f1ynRgznzEE51s%2Bdqs%3D","user_id":"1877615699833768","user_name":"嫈葕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1877615699833768","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7241145924909534248","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：王骁穿越汉末，获得无双谋士系统，但奖励却是武力值拉满，并且还要他成为一名谋士才能永久获得。
　　无奈之下王骁只能来到曹操这里，应聘谋士，但上岗第一天就当着曹操的面把典韦给暴打了一顿。
　　典韦：“我有想过自己会输，但我没想过我会输给一个谋士！”
　　吕布：“曹操麾下当真是没人了，居然让一个谋士出战……卧槽！锤下留人，吕布愿降！”
　　关羽：“王先生请你站起来一下，很好，在座的诸位都不过是插标卖首！”
　　曹操：“所以你就是这样当军师的？”
　　王骁：“你就说赢没赢？”
　　曹操：“……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/74623b2f41061f73730e521ad3430af2","author":"丞相别浪","author_id":"","book_id":"7241145924909534248","book_name":"一拳能打死吕布，你管他叫谋士？","book_short_name":"大魏相途","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":497,"name":"武将","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=497&name=武将&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7241146001073897995","read_count":"135174","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3367411"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1773","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国,武将","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/68b0410ea7367cfa45cb7b7404bce5cc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443651&x-signature=g5SX8T%2BXAvLQvstvRPiXIGyj1Sg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1477350394181581","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.3537374e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33537,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":26190},"user_ac 　　无奈之下王骁只能来到曹操这里，应聘谋士，但上岗第一天就当着曹操的面把典韦给暴打了一顿。
　　典韦：“我有想过自己会输，但我没想过我会输给一个谋士！”
　　吕布：“曹操麾下当真是没人了，居然让一个谋士出战……卧槽！锤下留人，吕布愿降！”
　　关羽：“王先生请你站起来一下，很好，在座的诸位都不过是插标卖首！”
　　曹操：“所以你就是这样当军师的？”
　　王骁：“你就说赢没赢？”

　　无奈之下王骁只能来到曹操这里，应聘谋士，但上岗第一天就当着曹操的面把典韦给暴打了一顿。
　　典韦：“我有想过自己会输，但我没想过我会输给一个谋士！”
